privileged_info_summary: The create_account_review task requires creating an Eramba Account Review record with title 'Q1 2025 Core Banking Access Review' and description containing SOX Section 404 and Core Banking Platform keywords. The deadline is March 31, 2025. Eramba is a real, open-source GRC software used via Docker. Account Reviews is a confirmed module in Eramba for systematic user account review. SOX Section 404 is a verified Sarbanes-Oxley Act requirement for management assessment of internal controls over financial reporting. Core Banking Access Review is a standard and realistic SOX compliance task for financial institutions. All metadata claims are verifiable against actual Eramba software capabilities and real compliance frameworks.
